Data Insights & Key Findings

Category Dominance: The Classic Category yields the highest execution performance, bringing in ₹2,20,053.10.

Velocity Metrics: Large (L) formats dominate overall capacity requirements, outputting over ₹3,75K in isolated receipts.

Peak Constraints: Demand velocities crest on Friday night shifts (₹1.36K), suggesting focused labor resource scheduling rules.

💡 Sidebar toggles utilize calibrated transaction models, addressing multi-item basket calculations flawlessly.
